mapper.select: SELECT TA001 single,TA002 singleNumber,TA003 documentDate,TA004 customerNo,MA002 customerName, TA009 currency,MF002 currencyName,ROUND((TA030 + TA029 - TA030),2) unAccount,TA020 advancePay FROM ACRTA LEFT JOIN CMSMF ON MF001 = TA009 LEFT JOIN COPMA ON MA001 = TA004 WHERE TA025 = 'Y' AND (TA030 + TA029 - TA030) > 0 AND TA020 < CONVERT(CHAR(8),GETDATE(),112) ORDER BY TA001

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACRTA LEFT JOIN ACRTB ON TA001 = TB001 LEFT JOIN CMSMF ON MF001 = TA009 LEFT JOIN COPMA ON MA001 = TA004 AND TA002 =TB002 WHERE TA025 = 'Y' AND (TA030 + TA029 - TA030) > 0 AND TA020 < CONVERT(CHAR(8),GETDATE(),112)

SELECT TA001 single,TA002 singleNumber,TA003 documentDate,TA004 customerNo,MA002 customerName, TA009 currency,MF002 currencyName,ROUND((TA030 + TA029 - TA030),2) unAccount,TA020 advancePay FROM ACRTA LEFT JOIN CMSMF ON MF001 = TA009 LEFT JOIN COPMA ON MA001 = TA004 WHERE TA025 = 'Y' AND (TA030 + TA029 - TA030) > 0 AND TA020 < CONVERT(CHAR(8),GETDATE(),112) AND TA001 = #{single} AND TA002 = #{singleNumber}
